rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a conceptual issue with the positioning of DermaNet as suitable for deployment across diverse patient populations without addressing potential limitations or biases.
rationale.R1.2: There is a minor logical consistency issue in claiming consistent improvement across all subgroups despite varying AUC values.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact has sentence-level prose issues, such as repetitive phrasing and lack of clarity in some sentences.
